summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new checkbox features ('Retornar Chamado' and 'Verificar Adnéia'), CPF search functionality, and Lista de Atendimentos stats cards. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all features working correctly including checkboxes, CPF search, and badges in the table.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0
ui_bugs.impact: Charts display correctly but generate console warnings - existing issue from previous iterations

passed_tests: API: Login with test@example.com credentials
API: Protected endpoints require authentication
API: CPF search returns correct pedido (CPF: 10856880620 → Pedido #92512612)
API: CPF search with formatted CPF works (108.568.806-20)
API: Create chamado with retornar_chamado=true
API: Create chamado with verificar_adneia=true
API: Create chamado with both checkboxes=true
API: Filter chamados by retornar_chamado=true
API: Filter chamados by verificar_adneia=true
API: Update chamado checkbox fields
API: Google Sheets connection status (initialized=true, connected=true)
UI: Login form working correctly
UI: Novo Chamado page loads correctly
UI: Search type dropdown works (Pedido, CPF, Nome, Entrega)
UI: CPF search returns pedido #92512612 for EDSON SOARES DE ARAUJO NETO
UI: 'Retornar Chamado' checkbox visible and clickable
UI: 'Verificar Adnéia' checkbox visible and clickable
UI: 'Aguardando' badges appear when checkboxes are checked
UI: Lista de Atendimentos page loads correctly
UI: Stats cards displayed: Pendentes, Retornar, Adnéia, Resolvidos, Total
UI: 'Adnéia' stats card visible with purple icon
UI: 'Retornar' stats card visible with rose icon
UI: 'Retornar' badge visible in atendimentos table
UI: 'Adnéia' badge visible in atendimentos table

checkbox_retornar_chamado.details: Checkbox displays in Novo Chamado form, saves to database, filters work, badge shows in table

checkbox_verificar_adneia.details: Checkbox displays in Novo Chamado form, saves to database, filters work, badge shows in table

cpf_search.details: CPF search correctly finds pedidos by customer CPF. Test CPF 10856880620 returns pedido #92512612

stats_cards_adneia.details: New 'Adnéia' stats card displays in Lista de Atendimentos with purple icon showing count of verificar_adneia=true

table_badges.details: Both 'Retornar' and 'Adnéia' badges display correctly in the atendimentos table STATUS column

google_sheets_integration.details: Google Sheets connection initialized, atendimentos sync working

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing pedido #92512612 from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly: 1) 'Retornar Chamado' checkbox in Novo Chamado form with data-testid='checkbox-retornar' and id='retornar-chamado', 2) 'Verificar Adnéia' checkbox with data-testid='checkbox-verificar-adneia' and id='verificar-adneia', 3) Both checkboxes show 'Aguardando' badge when checked, 4) CPF search works by selecting 'CPF' from dropdown (data-testid='select-search-type') then entering CPF in search box, 5) Lista de Atendimentos has 5 stats cards including new 'Adnéia' card, 6) Table shows 'Retornar' and 'Adnéia' badges in STATUS column. Backend filters work: ?retornar_chamado=true and ?verificar_adneia=true
